title: Rotterdam, South Holland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Rotterdam, South Holland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Rotterdam is a city in South Holland with a population of 670,610. Europe’s largest port city, known for bold modern architecture, a diverse international community, and a more affordable alternative to Amsterdam.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
